name: Simulating Federated Learning and Homomorphic Encryption
description: Simulates privacy-preserving ML training across distributed nodes using federated learning and homomorphic encryption.

name: WikiSpeaks — Scalable RAG-based Wikipedia Assistant
description: A scalable retrieval-augmented generation assistant that answers questions using Wikipedia as a knowledge base.

name: Interview AI
description: Dynamically generates follow-up interview questions by analyzing candidate responses using speech-to-text and a Llama LLM with FAISS vector search.

name: Promscale
description: LLM-augmented Kubernetes operator that combines Prometheus metrics with AI reasoning via Gemini to autoscale workloads with safety guardrails.

name: CounselRAG
description: Contextually-aware legal Q&A platform using fine-tuned Gemma models, FAISS vector search, and a Neo4j knowledge graph.
